StubHub.note: Chase terms: $150 Jan–Jun + $150 Jul–Dec; catalog text says only 'annual'

Schwab Appreciation Bonus.note: Tiered brokerage-asset bonus, not a recurring credit — the parser grabbed the $10M asset threshold as the amount

$200 Uber Cash.note: Amex terms: $15/mo + $20 bonus in December; the parser grabbed the December figure. The Dec bonus isn't representable, so tracking under-counts $20/yr

$100 Annual Hotel Savings Benefit.note: Citi terms: $100 off a single $500+ hotel stay per calendar year; the parser picked the stay minimum instead of the credit

$100 Annual software credit.note: Title says annual; monthly wording in the description won the cadence vote
